tasks.label: Build ROM (debug)
args: PROJECT_NAME="${PROJECT_NAME:-$(basename "$PWD")}"; make -C source clean && make -C source -j4 USERFLAGS='-Og -g3' USERCXXFLAGS='-Og -g3' && cp -f source/source.gba "./${PROJECT_NAME}.gba" && echo "Created ./${PROJECT_NAME}.gba"

tasks.label: Build ROM (release)
args: PROJECT_NAME="${PROJECT_NAME:-$(basename "$PWD")}"; make -C source clean && make -C source -j4 && cp -f source/source.gba "./${PROJECT_NAME}.gba" && echo "Created ./${PROJECT_NAME}.gba"

tasks.label: Prepare Debug Session (build + launch host mGBA)
